title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 546.730 - Place of executing judgment of death, duties of director
text:
546.730.  Place of executing judgment of death, duties of director. — A judgment of death must be executed within a correctional center of the department of corrections; and such execution shall be under the supervision and direction of the director of the department of corrections.
(RSMo 1939 § 4113, A.L. 1988 H.B. 1340 & 1348, A.L. 1990 H.B. 974, A.L. 1995 H.B. 424)
